message:
fix(discover): anchor last_resolve to decision-time, not post-resolve time

DnsServiceDiscovery::poll_discover() called time_getter() a second time
after resolve() returned to record last_resolve. With virtual or jittery
clocks this pushed the cooldown window forward, causing re-resolution to
happen later than the configured poll_interval. Use the `now` captured at
the top of poll_discover() for both success and error paths.

Includes regression test: dns_discovery_last_resolve_uses_decision_time_not_post_resolve_time

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
